commands.review_summary:
The branch extracts media primitives and ACP shared/runtime types into private workspace packages and rewires SDK, UI, build, watch, Vitest, and package-boundary aliases to those packages.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an internal package-boundary refactor, not a reported user bug. The high-confidence review path is source, diff, guard-scope, and package/dependency inspection.
